title: Offhand Weapon Holstering
description: Makes weapons in the offhand appear holstered
body:
# Offhand Weapon Holstering
### By StefanJ2_

*a [BetterVanillaBuilding](https://bettervanillabuilding.com/) project.*

![Holstering](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/584c5b9814138f0b5a7037af2282b70b1ee5c6d1.png)
# Pack description
Offhand weapon holstering will make weapons and tools appear in a holstered state when held in the offhand!
Works for both righthanded and lefthanded players depending on which edition you download. 

[![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4e25d7050de673271a8ab33cd0db2cdb69d4a1fa.png)](https://discord.gg/a6KDAEpy6N)[![Twitch](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ae95f05075ea9788053db9f0ff57bfdf352bcd6b.png)](https://www.twitch.tv/stefanj2_)[![Patreon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f8c479244841e2fbcbde64c2e51fe3610f6ef432.png)](https://www.patreon.com/BetterVanillaBuilding)

![holstering2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f8811fbfba922cb57aa4e26cc5a115c96f0ac9f6.png)
